pipeline:.github/workflows/ci.yml.name: ci.yml
pipeline:.github/workflows/ci.yml.summary: GitHub Actions workflow configured to run backend tests (with a PostgreSQL service container) and build the frontend application upon push or pull requests to the main branch.

config:.understand-anything/tmp/ua-impor.name: ua-import-map-input.json
config:.understand-anything/tmp/ua-impor.summary: Temporary configuration file containing the input list of workspace files for resolving import mappings.

config:.understand-anything/tmp/ua-impor.name: ua-import-map-output.json
config:.understand-anything/tmp/ua-impor.summary: Temporary configuration file containing the resolved import maps and metrics for the workspace files.

config:.understand-anything/tmp/ua-scan-.name: ua-scan-files.json
config:.understand-anything/tmp/ua-scan-.summary: Temporary configuration file storing the complete list of files identified during workspace scanning, including their languages and categories.

layer:infrastructure.name: Infrastructure & CI/CD
layer:infrastructure.description: Docker files, Docker Compose, Nginx server configurations, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platform configurations.

layer:configuration.name: Configuration & Metadata
layer:configuration.description: Project configurations, dependencies manifests, tooling rules, build parameters, environments, and general project documentation.

layer:testing.name: Testing Layer
layer:testing.description: Unit and integration tests, testing environment setup, test helpers, and runner configuration files.

layer:frontend-ui.name: Frontend UI Layer
layer:frontend-ui.description: React user interface components, views, main application shell, entry point, styling files, and structural HTML templates.

layer:frontend-state.name: Frontend State & Data
layer:frontend-state.description: Redux store configuration, slices, typed state hooks, and web socket handling middleware.

layer:backend-api.name: Backend API & Core Services
layer:backend-api.description: Express HTTP entry points, router setups, controller endpoints, and real-time simulator logic.

layer:backend-middleware.name: Backend Middleware
layer:backend-middleware.description: Express handlers executing before route handlers, such as authorization and token verification.

layer:data-layer.name: Data Layer & Migrations
layer:data-layer.description: Database connection clients, seed scripts, Prisma schema, migration locks, and specific SQL table schema layouts.

nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/App.tsx: The root application component that manages user authentication state, fetches initial logs/data for administrators, and routes users to either the admin dashboard, the driver portal, or login views.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/AnalyticsVi: Displays visual business intelligence graphs, KPI metrics, route progress statistics, and driver utilization charts using Recharts.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/DashboardVi: Serves as the primary operational workspace for administrators, listing overall shipment indicators, recent actions, and integrating the live ControlCenter maps.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/DriverPorta: Provides the dedicated interface for drivers, allowing them to view active assignments, update shipment dispatch statuses, record reached checkpoints, and sign out.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/FleetView.t: Implements the fleet administration panel, displaying driver counts, availability statuses, and active route progress cards in a clear tabular grid.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/Landing.tsx: The unauthenticated landing page of the application, showing product overview, features, pricing links, and quick-access login/register triggers.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/Login.tsx: Standard login/register form component that communicates with authentication services to request tokens and updates the global user session state.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/MetricsGrid: A lightweight layout component showing administrative status metrics (Total Shipments, Active Shipments, Driver Utilization, and On-Time Rate) via API integration.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Implements the left sidebar navigation layout for the admin view, letting administrators toggle between the main operational views and log out.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/config.ts: Application configuration module that exports REST API and WebSocket endpoint URLs determined by environment variables and local dev states.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/store/authSlice.ts: Redux slice that manages the authenticated user session, loading states, error responses, and session validation thunks.
nodeSummaryIndex.file:frontend/src/store/hooks.ts: Provides strongly-typed React Redux hook wrappers `useAppDispatch` and `useAppSelector` for accessing the global store.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/App.tsx:App: Root application component that initializes the app by validating existing session cookies, configuring real-time web sockets for admin roles, and navigating drivers to their portal.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/Analyti: Aggregates driver statistics, delivery indicators, and routes progress, using Recharts components to render status breakdowns, route speeds, and fleet utilization.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/Dashboa: Renders the primary administrator cockpit, displaying real-time metrics cards, shipment lists, active shipment donut slices, and the interactive dispatch control center.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/DriverP: A sub-component rendering a clean standby status layout for drivers who currently have no active shipments assigned to them.
Displays detailed interactive information about the driver's active dispatch including tracking numbers, origin/destination, target dispatch times, and checkpoints checklist.
Main view wrapper for drivers to load and list their assigned shipments, trigger dispatch starts, mark checkpoints reached, and monitor their performance stats.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/FleetVi: Renders cards summarizing fleet statistics alongside a tabular layout of all registered drivers, active jobs, and warehouse assignments.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/Landing: Renders a modern landing page for logitrack with styled gradient cards and links leading to login or registration pages.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/Login.t: Renders a form supporting registration and login using state hooks to handle inputs, trigger post requests to api boundaries, and dispatch Redux actions.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/Metrics: Fills in a grid of cards using metrics endpoints, refreshing details automatically on changes to shipments and drivers state.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/components/Sidebar: Displays the logitrack brand logo and allows navigation across Command Center, Analytics, Tracking, and Fleet views, as well as signing out.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/store/authSlice.ts: An async Redux thunk that queries the authentication endpoint to verify session validity and loads user details upon fulfillment.
nodeSummaryIndex.function:frontend/src/store/hooks.ts:use: A custom React Redux hook wrapper that exposes a strongly-typed dispatch function for updating the Redux state.
nodeSummaryIndex.pipeline:.github/workflows/ci.yml: GitHub Actions workflow configured to run backend tests (with a PostgreSQL service container) and build the frontend application upon push or pull requests to the main branch.
nodeSummaryIndex.config:.understand-anything/tmp/ua-impor: Temporary configuration file containing the input list of workspace files for resolving import mappings.
Temporary configuration file containing the resolved import maps and metrics for the workspace files.
